notFound.title: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.description: The link may be broken, the page may have been moved, or the URL may be incorrect. Let's get you back to a valid page.

notFound.cardDescription: The page may have been removed or the address is not valid.

unauthorized.title: You do not have permission to access this page.
unauthorized.description: Your account is signed in, but your current role does not have access to this resource. Please contact an administrator if you believe this is a mistake.
unauthorized.tip: Tip: Different roles may have access to different sections of the system.
unauthorized.sideTitle: This section is not available for your role.
unauthorized.sideDescription: Some pages are only visible to authorized roles such as admin, recruiter, or candidate depending on system permissions.
unauthorized.cardDescription: Your current role cannot open this page.

common.demoNotice: This page is provided for demonstration purposes in the Job Portal system. For official support, please contact <supportLink>support@jobportal.com</supportLink>.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Learn how Job Portal collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
privacy.label: Data Protection

sections.heading: Personal Information
sections.description: We may collect your name, email address, phone number, CV, job applications, and profile information to provide recruitment services.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Data
sections.description: Your information is used to manage applications, recommend suitable jobs, improve platform experience, and support communication between candidates and employers.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.description: We apply technical and organizational measures to help protect your account, CV files, and application history from unauthorized access.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Review the rules and conditions for using the Job Portal platform.
terms.label: Platform Rules

sections.heading: User Responsibilities
sections.description: Users are expected to provide accurate information, keep their account secure, and use the platform in a lawful and respectful manner.

sections.heading: Candidate Usage
sections.description: Candidates should only upload valid CVs and apply for jobs that match their profile, experience, and career interests.

sections.heading: Employer Usage
sections.description: Employers must publish truthful job information, respect applicant privacy, and avoid misleading recruitment content.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.subtitle: Manage how cookies are used to improve your experience on Job Portal.
cookies.label: Preferences

sections.heading: Essential Cookies
sections.description: These cookies are required for login, authentication, security, and basic platform functionality.

sections.heading: Analytics Cookies
sections.description: Analytics cookies help us understand how users interact with the platform and improve overall usability.

sections.heading: Preference Cookies
sections.description: Preference cookies remember your selected settings, such as language, theme, or display preferences.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.subtitle: Our goal is to make Job Portal usable and accessible for all users.
accessibility.label: Inclusive Experience

sections.heading: Keyboard Navigation
sections.description: We aim to support keyboard-friendly navigation across forms, buttons, menus, and important actions.

sections.heading: Readable Interface
sections.description: The interface is designed with clear typography, spacing, contrast, and responsive layouts for different screen sizes.

sections.heading: Continuous Improvement
sections.description: We continue to improve accessibility based on user feedback, usability testing, and modern web standards.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Need help? Contact our support team for account, CV, or job posting issues.
support.label: Help Center

sections.heading: Account Support
sections.description: Get help with login issues, account access, role switching, profile updates, and security concerns.

sections.heading: Candidate Support
sections.description: Candidates can contact us for CV upload issues, job applications, saved jobs, or application tracking.

sections.heading: Employer Support
sections.description: Employers can request support for company setup, job posting, applicant management, and dashboard usage.

header.title: System Setting
header.description: Manage industries, specializations and skills used across the platform.
